mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resumes WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resumes WHERE file_hash = #{fileHash}
SELECT * FROM resumes ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resumes ( file_hash, original_filename, file_size, content_type, storage_key, storage_url, resume_text, uploaded_at, last_accessed_at, access_count, analyze_status, analyze_error ) VALUES ( #{entity.fileHash}, #{entity.originalFilename}, #{entity.fileSize}, #{entity.contentType}, #{entity.storageKey}, #{entity.storageUrl}, #{entity.resumeText}, COALESCE(#{entity.uploadedAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{entity.lastAccessedAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{entity.accessCount}, 1), #{entity.analyzeStatus}, #{entity.analyzeError} )
mapper.update: UPDATE resumes SET file_hash = #{entity.fileHash}, original_filename = #{entity.originalFilename}, file_size = #{entity.fileSize}, content_type = #{entity.contentType}, storage_key = #{entity.storageKey}, storage_url = #{entity.storageUrl}, resume_text = #{entity.resumeText}, uploaded_at = #{entity.uploadedAt}, last_accessed_at = #{entity.lastAccessedAt}, access_count = #{entity.accessCount}, analyze_status = #{entity.analyzeStatus}, analyze_error = #{entity.analyzeError} WHERE id = #{entity.id}
